summary:
EXP-404 closes ISS-1965 by adding a dedicated

Why the Chebychev low-pass rescue fails

subsection between "What past SG data actually shows" and "The vise" inside SEC-6.14 (data/sections.json:part6.html). Engages the dome's strongest published-or-anticipated rebuttal on four grounds: (1) standard SG-pipeline filter corners (microseism-suppression seconds; drift-removal >24h) do not touch the 1-min-to-3-hour band where κ predicts the contact-phase pulse; (2) raw 1-2 Hz IGETS records are archived independently of Level-3 publications and Mansinha 2001 reports no pulse against a 30-900× margin from those raw records; (3) the rescue is symmetric against the dome's own INTERMAGNET 1-minute BOU magnetometer numerator, which is itself digitally filtered — rejecting filtered SG products on filter grounds rejects κ's own numerator; (4) the rescue is unfalsifiable as published — no transfer function, corner frequency, application list, or forward attenuation calculation appears in monitor.py, predictions.html, or raw-text/05-model.txt. Acknowledges the kernel of truth (Level-3 SG pipelines DO apply digital filters; Boy & Hinderer 2006, Crossley 2013) before refuting. Patch anchors on the unique string "

The vise

" with insert-before semantics; no TLDR update needed. Three-cycle carry-forward (c1 2026-05-11T05:18Z → c2 → c3 2026-05-11T13:22Z) now closeable.
notes_for_batchable_cleanup: EXP-404 also flags three independent hygiene items for the decider to batch with the integration commit if convenient: (a) ISS-1963 Domain #7 → #5 (3 sites: SEC-6.14, WIN-013.detail_evidence, WIN-014.detail_evidence; 3-character patch each); (b) ISS-1964 Crossley 2013 vs 2022 DOI mismatch in "What past SG data actually shows" (replace 10.1007/s00024-022-03000-4 with 10.1088/0034-4885/76/4/046101 OR update in-text year to 2022); (c) duplicated paragraph in "What past SG data actually shows" (two identical Mansinha-2001 pipeline sentences back-to-back). These are not part of ISS-1965's scope but cluster naturally with the same-section commit.
